Box Model Test Fixture

Margin

Margin 20px all sides
Margin: 10px top/bottom, 40px left/right

Padding

Padding 30px all sides
Padding: 5px top/bottom, 40px left/right

Border

3px solid blue border
2px dashed red border
Different borders on each side

Border Radius

Small radius (4px)
Large radius (20px)
Pill shape
Circle

Box Sizing

content-box: width 200px + padding + border
border-box: total width 200px including padding + border

Width & Height

Fixed width: 300px
Fixed height: 60px
Min-width: 250px
Max-width: 200px with text that might overflow the constraint.
Min-height: 80px
Max-height: 40px, overflow hidden. This text will be clipped.
